title: Robust Australian Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew originating from Australia, made with tender chunks of beef, robust spices, and a hint of sweetness from the papelon.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Sear the beef until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
4. Add more oil if necessary and sauté the onion until softened.
5. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
6. Add the papelon, stew, robust pepper, salt, and peppercorns.
8. Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
9. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1.5 hours or until the beef is tender.
